titleZh: ALI《公司治理原则：分析与建议》
titleEn: ALI Principles of Corporate Governance: Analysis and Recommendations
summaryZh: ALI《公司治理原则》并非制定法，但长期影响美国公司治理、董事义务、控制股东交易与派生诉讼的讨论，是比较法研究中的高频参照物。
summaryEn: Although not a statute, the ALI Principles have long shaped discussion of governance, fiduciary duties, controlling-shareholder transactions, and derivative suits in U.S. corporate law.

sources.label: Publisher page
sources.noteZh: ALI 项目页为机构入口，非全文开放版本。
sources.noteEn: The ALI project page is an institutional entry point rather than an open full-text edition.

sources.label: Research platform
sources.noteZh: Google Books 可用于查看书目信息和部分预览。
sources.noteEn: Google Books provides bibliographic information and limited preview access.
